name: Rohkostsalat (Cabbage Fruit Salad with Sour-Cream Dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cabbage and apple.
2. Use 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to wet the diced apple, preventing it from darkening.
3. Toss the shredded cabbage with raisins and diced apple.
4. Mix the pineapple juice, salt, and sugar in a separate bowl until smooth.
5. Add the sour cream to the fruit mixture and stir until well combined.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and chill.
